problem_solved: Small and midsize businesses face disproportionate healthcare costs and limited plan options compared to large enterprises
solution_description: Health benefits platform for SMBs offering level-funded health plans with zero-cost coverage for common services. Flagship Comfort plan provides 94% of office visits at no cost. Also offers ICHRA (Individual Coverage HRA) solutions with 29% average employer savings
traction_signals: 94% zero-dollar office visits for Comfort members
notes: Health insurance/benefits platform for SMBs. Not SDOH-focused but addresses cost barriers to care. Featured at Davos 2026. Low Varden fit - more about plan design and cost management vs. SDOH infrastructure
